# Westinghouse Pet Taiwan — LLM Context

Westinghouse Pet Taiwan is the official e-commerce website for Westinghouse Pet products in Taiwan. We sell premium pet care products including smart feeders, automatic litter boxes, pet water fountains, dryers, and health monitors.

## Products
- M81 鲜湿粮智慧喂食器 (M81 Smart Wet/Dry Food Feeder) — Automatic scheduling, portion control
- A80 智能猫砂盆 (A80 Automatic Litter Box) — Self-cleaning, odor control
- D61 智能饮水机 (D61 Smart Water Fountain) — UV sterilization, circulation
- M12 陶瓷饮水机 (M12 Ceramic Water Fountain) — Whisper quiet, BPA-free
- X71 宠物烘干箱 (X71 Pet Dryer Box) — 71L large capacity, smart temperature control

## Support
- Warranty registration: /support/warranty-register
- Warranty lookup: /support/warranty-check
- Repair tickets: /support/create-ticket
- Repair status: /support/repair-status
- Customer service hotline: 0800-000-000

## Policies
- Free shipping on orders over NT$2,000
- 1-year warranty on all products
- 7-day return policy for unopened items
- LINE support coming soon
